top_signals.title: Bitcoin, ether ETFs end 13- and 17-day outflow streaks as traders rotate into equity perps ahead of NFP: analysts
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin ETFs ended a 13-day outflow streak with $3M inflows, and ETH ETFs snapped a 17-day run ahead of NFP as traders rotate to equity perps.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: World Cup tests Lenovo's ambitions to challenge AI champions
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Back Bonnard to upset Cellini in the Derby
top_signals.summary: WORLD Pool is in operation for a second successive day at Epsom, with all eight races on Derby Day being globally commingled. I’m keen to play in the feature and take advantage of the potential for healthy overpays offered by the global pools, and you can too by betting with the Tote. BENVENUTO CELLINI spearheads [...]
